hero_subtitle: SFTY provides compliance leaders with a unified control layer to oversee onboarding, monitoring, case management, and regulatory reporting across digital asset operations.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive visibility fades across compliance workflows
problem_description: Leadership struggles to maintain a clear operating view when onboarding, monitoring, case management and reporting systems remain siloed. This limits timely insight into risk controls and weakens audit readiness across complex digital asset compliance operations.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates onboarding, monitoring, case management and reporting workflows into a unified control layer so leaders gain timely visibility and stronger audit readiness across compliance operations.
workflow_title: From onboarding checks to compliance decisions
workflow_description: SFTY structures onboarding checks, applies internal policies, routes risk reviews, records decisions, preserves evidence and prepares reports within one executive control workflow.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: More than workflow control. Executive risk visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides VASP executives a unified compliance layer that structures workflows, preserves decision evidence, and delivers scalable audit-ready visibility across risk and reporting.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY gives VASPs a controlled compliance layer to unify workflows, preserve audit evidence and strengthen bank due diligence within scalable enterprise deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support enterprise compliance workflow control
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows connect onboarding and monitoring
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports risk and compliance reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Explain how SFTY provides scalable control for executive oversight
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives a connected compliance control layer that improves risk visibility, audit readiness and scalable oversight across onboarding, monitoring, cases and reporting workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY control compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs into structured workflows that apply policies, route cases, log decisions and track regulatory updates for clearer operational control and consistency.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages to support internal reviews, audit readiness and defensible compliance reporting.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing providers and compliance systems, integrating their outputs into a single operational workflow with role-based access and governance.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYC, KYT, Travel Rule or screening providers; it organizes their outputs into one controlled compliance operating layer.
final_title: Bring enterprise control to compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY supports execution and oversight across onboarding, monitoring, case management and reporting workflows for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
